architectural_notes: Pass vetKey through navigation/routing between Dashboard and Compose to preserve selected vet context.

existing_features.title: Introduce a frontend "vetKey" mechanism that allows the app to persist and retrieve the caller's transport keypair across navigation so that a transport key generated/rotated on the Dashboard is available on the Compose screen without requiring regeneration in the new page/tab.

Update the Dashboard UI to surface the current vetKey and provide an explicit action to navigate to Compose while passing the vetKey value as a URL parameter (or hash parameter) so Compose can load the correct persisted transport key context.

Update ComposeMessagePage to read the vetKey from the URL (and/or persisted session) and initialize transport key access using that vetKey so that message sending eligibility checks reflect the actual locally-available transport keypair.

new_feature_requests.summary: Use a vetKey to pass context/state between Dashboard and Compose screens

projectName: Use vetKey to share transport key context between Dashboard and Compose
